all.en: This report summarizes the performance of our email program during the first quarter.
all.zh: 本報告總結我們電子郵件方案於第一季的成效表現。

all.en: A total of twenty four campaigns were sent to our subscriber base.
all.zh: 總計向訂閱戶名單發送了二十四檔活動。

all.en: Our active subscriber count grew from sixty thousand to sixty eight thousand.
all.zh: 活躍訂閱人數從六萬人成長至六萬八千人。

all.en: The average open rate across all sends was twenty six percent.
all.zh: 所有寄發的平均開信率為百分之二十六。

all.en: This figure exceeds the industry benchmark by roughly four percentage points.
all.zh: 此數字超越業界基準約四個百分點。

all.en: The average click through rate landed at three point eight percent.
all.zh: 平均點擊率落在百分之三點八。

all.en: Tuesday morning sends consistently outperformed other day and time slots.
all.zh: 週二上午寄發的成效持續優於其他日期與時段。

all.en: The product launch announcement generated our highest revenue per email.
all.zh: 產品上市公告創造了我們最高的每封郵件營收。

all.en: Loyalty members opened our messages at nearly twice the average rate.
all.zh: 忠誠會員開信率接近平均值的兩倍。

all.en: Subject lines featuring numbers outperformed those using emojis.
all.zh: 含數字的主旨表現優於使用表情符號者。

all.en: Personalized first name greetings lifted open rates by about three percent.
all.zh: 個人化名字稱呼提升開信率約百分之三。

all.en: Mobile devices accounted for seventy two percent of all opens.
all.zh: 行動裝置占所有開信數的百分之七十二。

all.en: Our unsubscribe rate stayed below zero point four percent throughout the quarter.
all.zh: 整季退訂率維持在百分之零點四以下。

all.en: Spam complaints remained negligible at fewer than ten reports per send.
all.zh: 垃圾郵件投訴維持極低，每次寄發少於十件回報。

all.en: The abandoned cart automation drove the strongest conversion at nine percent.
all.zh: 棄購自動化郵件帶來最強轉換率達百分之九。

all.en: Welcome series engagement remained healthy with a fifty percent open rate.
all.zh: 歡迎信系列互動表現穩健，開信率達百分之五十。

all.en: Two segments showed declining engagement and need re engagement flows.
all.zh: 兩個分眾出現互動下滑，需要再喚醒流程。

all.en: Image heavy templates loaded slowly on older Android devices.
all.zh: 圖片量大的版型在較舊的 Android 裝置上載入緩慢。

all.en: We will adopt lightweight templates and lazy loading in the next quarter.
all.zh: 下一季我們將採用輕量版型與延遲載入。

all.en: List hygiene cleaning removed about twelve hundred inactive addresses.
all.zh: 名單清潔作業移除了約一千兩百個非活躍地址。

all.en: Deliverability scores improved after we tightened our authentication settings.
all.zh: 在我們強化驗證設定後，送達率分數有所改善。

all.en: Total revenue attributed to email reached one point two million dollars.
all.zh: 歸因於電子郵件的總營收達一百二十萬美元。

all.en: Recommended next steps include richer segmentation and a content refresh.
all.zh: 建議的下一步包含更細緻的分眾與內容更新。

all.en: The detailed appendix contains campaign by campaign breakdowns for reference.
all.zh: 詳細附件包含逐檔活動拆解可供參考。

all.en: Marketing leadership reviewed these findings during last week strategy session.
all.zh: 行銷主管團隊已於上週策略會議檢視這些發現。

all.en: We will pilot a new preference center to capture more granular interests.
all.zh: 我們將試行新版偏好中心以蒐集更細緻的興趣資料。

all.en: The creative team plans to test plain text variants against designed templates.
all.zh: 創意團隊計畫測試純文字版本與設計版型的差異。

all.en: Send time optimization tools will be evaluated during the coming quarter.
all.zh: 下一季將評估寄送時間最佳化工具。

all.en: A budget request has been filed to upgrade our deliverability monitoring stack.
all.zh: 我們已提報預算申請，以升級送達率監控工具組。

all.en: We will also expand triggered flows to cover post purchase touchpoints.
all.zh: 我們也會擴增觸發式流程，涵蓋購後接觸點。

all.en: Customer service feedback will inform refinements to our transactional emails.
all.zh: 客服回饋將用於精修交易型郵件內容。

all.en: Training sessions for the regional teams are scheduled for next month.
all.zh: 區域團隊的訓練課程已排定於下個月舉行。

all.en: Compliance reviewed every campaign and confirmed all regional regulations were met.
all.zh: 法遵已審查每檔活動並確認皆符合各區域法規。

all.en: Questions about specific metrics should be directed to the analytics partner.
all.zh: 關於特定指標的疑問請洽分析合作夥伴。
